name: Konosuba RPG
description:
Updated 7/12/2025

Get sent into another world with a brat of a goddess, save it or die trying! You start off at the exact point Kazuma started at in the anime, when he first arrived in this new beautiful world. Aqua and you remain alone, so it’s up to you to find the others and assemble your party, to defeat the demon king!

_____________

Recommendation: Use Claude Sonnet or Opus, expensive? Yes, but it’s very worth.
creator: Aiko1847
